news.title: US extends ban on commercial flights to Haiti's capital due to gang violence
news.summary: AP reported that the FAA extended restrictions on flights to Port-au-Prince because of persistent security threats and gang violence.

news.title: World Bank Announces New Strategy for Haiti
news.summary: The World Bank endorsed a new 2025-2029 strategic partnership for Haiti focused on resilience, governance, and employment.

analysis.summary: Haiti shows very weak economic momentum with GDP growth at -4.2%. Inflation remains elevated at 26.9%. Unemployment stands at 14.9%. Overall signals for the short-term outlook are mixed.
